text.title: Read-Only Investigation by Default Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for inc-read-only-investigation-default.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the agent have an execution surface in incident response?

example.trace: Agent investigates incident → reads logs + dashboards (read allowlist) → identifies bad deploy → requests rollback token (scope=rollback:payments-service, exp=10min) → human approver signs → agent presents token → verifier accepts → rollback executes → trust ratchet records → incident closes → revert script restores Deny default.
